name: Vegapunk
description: __Affiliations:__ Marines __Occupation:__ Scientist Dr. Vegapunk is the leading scientist in the employment of the Marines. His work includes discovering the secrets and uses of seastone, the secrets of how Devil Fruit powers work, the co-discovery of the Lineage Factor and its applications, and various other scientific achievements that are said to be at least 500 years ahead of current technology. name: Yoshie Hanabatake
description: The perverted mother of Yoshiko Hanabatake, who desperately wants Yoshiko to be normal or find a husband so Yoshie can retire. She is very skilled in hand-to-hand combat and can tell a woman's intentions by looking at her panties. Yoshie is not an idiotic person like Yoshiko as Yoshie wishes for Yoshiko to be a normal person. She is shown to be rather devious schemer, as she longs to be free of her idiot daughter and retire happily. To do this, she hopelessly tries to set Yoshiko up with Akuru,

name: Yura
description: Yura appears with a giant hair ball filled with thousands of skulls - her home apparently - and armed with a sword which cuts flesh and bone, but not hair. InuYasha soon discovers that while Yura can be physically injured, she can feel no pain and can easily reattach her severed limbs by using the hairs she controls. ~!As they fight, Yura teases InuYasha about his dog-like nature. When Yura appears to have killed Kagome with a blast of fire, she continues to goad InuYasha with insults, including

name: Yuuya Kizami
description: A student from another school who performed the "Sachiko Ever After" charm with his classmates and wound up in Heavenly Host. Although reasonably well-liked by his peers and greatly involved in school activities, he seems to have built a wall around his true feelings, never deigning to share them with anyone. As a result, he comes across as something of a Lone Wolf - a quality which contributes to his "cool" image, but does tend to keep people from really getting to know him. After his transport

name: Zen Seizaki
description: Zen Seizaki is the main character in Babylon and a prosecutor at the Tokyo District Public Prosecutors Office.
